nodes.title: note
widgets_values:
# Tail loss and pre frames

These are warm up and warm down frames. This helps keeps things continuous. Default settings work best.

## 🧩 Workflow Instructions

### click on the UI button and enter everything and then RUN The workflow. 

✨ Done!

nodes.title: LLM MODEL
widgets_values:
# Model Download

Download the model here:

[supergemma4-26b-uncensored-fast-v2-Q4_K_M.gguf](https://huggingface.co/Jiunsong/supergemma4-26b-uncensored-gguf-v2/resolve/main/supergemma4-26b-uncensored-fast-v2-Q4_K_M.gguf)

[mmproj-BF16.gguf](https://huggingface.co/unsloth/gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-GGUF/resolve/main/mmproj-BF16.gguf)

Place both downloaded files here:

```text
Models/LLM

nodes.title: LTX models used in  this workflow
widgets_values:
## 📦 Required Models & Assets

### 🧠 Diffusion Model
- **ltx-2.3-distilled gguf models**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Abiray/LTX-2.3-22B-DISTILLED-1.1-GGUF/tree/main)

---

### 🎥 Video & 🔊 Audio VAE
- **LTX2.3_video_vae_bf16.safetensors**  
- **LTX2.3_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/vae)

---

### 📝Clip Text / Instruction Model
- **gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated-sikaworld-high-fidelity-edition.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Sikaworld1990/gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated-sikaworld-high-fidelity-edition-Ltx-2/resolve/main/gemma-3-12b-it-abliterated-sikaworld-high-fidelity-edition.safetensors)

---

### 🔤 Clip Text Encoder / Embeddings
- **ltx-2.3_text_projection_bf16.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/Kijai/LTX2.3_comfy/tree/main/text_encoders)

---

### 🔍 Spatial Upscaler
- **ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors**  
  🔗 [Download](https://huggingface.co/prince-canuma/LTX-2.3-distilled/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors)

---

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── ltx-2.3-distilled_1.1-Q6_k.gguf
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      ├── ltx-2.3-text_projection_bf16.safetensors
│   │      └── gemma Model
│   ├── 📂 vae/
│   │      ├── LTX2.3_video_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   │      └── LTX2.3_audio_vae_bf16.safetensors
│   └── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│          └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.1.safetensors

```

nodes.title: Remake mode
widgets_values:
# Move bad clips to remake folder

At the end of the run, you can move clips you don't like to the remake folder. Then turn on "use remake folder" and hit run. It will remake the clips for you. If you do this more than once make sure to delete any temp files from the folder first.

nodes.title: WALK THROUGH VIDOE
widgets_values:
# Full Workflow Walkthrough Video

This video walks through the complete Nano Banana process  
from start to finish using a real video project.

### 🎬 Walkthrough Video
[WATCH ON YOUTUBE](https://youtu.be/LwG-zxY684M) 

Shows full setup, prompt workflow, reference image usage,
and the exact process used to produce the final result.

The subject reaches out with expressive hands while tilting her head back, her mouth moving in a powerful vocal performance with intense, emotive facial expressions. Her ethereal light blue gown and flowing hair react dynamically to her movements and the swirling air. The lighting shifts as golden light drifts and flickers through the vast space, casting dancing shadows. The camera performs a sweeping cinematic arc before zooming in toward her face while maintaining her centered, clear framing. The environment responds with shimmering particles and shifting golden light as the atmosphere breathes with her energy.

nodes.title: Lora note
widgets_values:
**Optional LoRA Setup**

You can add a **LoRA Loader** node between either pass and its matching **Set Pass** node if you want to apply a LoRA only to that specific pass.

For example:

- **First Pass → LoRA Loader → Set First Pass**
- **Second Pass → LoRA Loader → Set Second Pass**

inputs.text: A medium close-up shot features a Caucasian man with a closely shaven head and face, wearing a black baseball cap with "PNTR" in white letters on the front, and a dark grey t-shirt with "JUST DO IT" visible across his chest. A small black microphone is clipped to his shirt collar. He is positioned slightly to the left of the frame, looking intently downwards and to his right, his eyes focused off-camera. His facial expression is one of deep concentration, with his brow slightly furrowed. As he looks down, a quick sniff sound is heard, and then he speaks with a deep male voice and a slightly frustrated tone, saying, "I think it's so bad." The camera remains static throughout, maintaining a shallow depth of field, which keeps the man in sharp focus while the background is softly blurred, revealing a light-colored wall with white wooden shelving or trim, and a partially open white wooden door on the right. After a brief pause, another short, audible sniff is heard. The man then continues to speak, his voice maintaining the same quality, as he states, "So bad. So bad." He elaborates further, emphasizing his point with a final statement, "This got to be, it's got to be the worst tool I've ever seen."
